name: Go Read-only Promotion Gate
go_runtime_role: read-only sidecar and controlled routing candidate
required_evidence: Python vs Go response diff tests
Pi sidecar smoke on copied v16 DB
Go logs contain no write attempts
blocked_until_future_phase: attachments, export, cleanup, and server maintenance
removing or weakening the Python backend
Go-managed migration or automatic production DB repair

next_phase.title: Controlled Read Routing Proof
next_phase.scope: local-only or sidecar-only proof for routing the existing read surface to Go behind an explicit reversible switch
